inputs.question: Using International Paper Company's 10-K as of FY 2024 and 01-02-2025 for stock price date (closing share price from Yahoo Finance), what % of enterprise value is net debt? Round your answer to 2 decimal points. Assume long term investments are non-operating and make sure to factor in line-items like subsequent events, investments in affiliates, net pension liabilities, etc. Assume operating lease liabilities are material and are debt equivalents. Assume no dilution from stock-based compensation and convertible instruments, and assume fully diluted shares is equal to weighted average diluted shares outstanding. Show your full solution; include formulas, calculations, intermediate steps, and assumptions.

Using Roper Technologies's 10-K as of FY 2024, if cash outflow from dividend payments in FY 2024 had instead been used to pay down debt, what would net debt have been in FY 2024? Round your answer to 2 decimal points. Assume operating lease liabilities are material and are debt equivalents. Assume no dilution from stock-based compensation and convertible instruments. Show your full solution; include formulas, calculations, intermediate steps, and assumptions.

What is Roper Technologies's net debt as of the FY 2024 10-K? Round your answer to 2 decimal points. Assume operating lease liabilities are material and are debt equivalents. Assume no dilution from stock-based compensation and convertible instruments. Show your full solution; include formulas, calculations, intermediate steps, and assumptions.

Using Adobe's 10-K as of FY 2024, if cash outflow from share repurchase in FY 2024 had instead been used to pay down debt, what would net debt have been in FY 2024? Round your answer to 2 decimal points. Assume operating lease liabilities are material and are debt equivalents. Assume no dilution from stock-based compensation and convertible instruments. Show your full solution; include formulas, calculations, intermediate steps, and assumptions.

What is Adobe's net debt as of the FY 2024 10-K? Round your answer to 2 decimal points. Assume operating lease liabilities are material and are debt equivalents. Assume no dilution from stock-based compensation and convertible instruments. Show your full solution; include formulas, calculations, intermediate steps, and assumptions.
